# signoz_planned_maintenance (Data Source)

Reads a single SigNoz planned maintenance window by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "signoz_planned_maintenance" "by_id" {
  id = signoz_planned_maintenance.weekly.id
}

output "planned_maintenance_name" {
  value = data.signoz_planned_maintenance.by_id.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->

## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) ID of the maintenance window to look up.

### Read-Only

- `alert_ids` (List of String) IDs of specific alerts the window applies to.
- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `created_by` (String) User who created the window.
- `description` (String) Description.
- `kind` (String) Server-assigned kind tag.
- `name` (String) Name of the maintenance window.
- `schedule` (Attributes) Schedule definition. Same shape as the resource attribute.
- `updated_at` (String) Last-update timestamp.
- `updated_by` (String) User who last updated the window.
